raw_transcript: If the diuretics don't start moving it within a week, we'll have him come in for a therapeutic paracentesis to drain the fluid. Let's schedule a follow-up for next Thursday. Keep a log of his bowel movements and whether the confusion is clearing up.
final_corrected_note: If the diuretics don't start moving it within a week, we'll have him come in for a therapeutic paracentesis to drain the fluid. Let's schedule a follow-up for next Thursday. Keep a log of his bowel movements and whether the confusion is clearing up.
